title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・Hands Up

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
They're all so damn strong. My legs're still
tremblin'... But...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'll do better—even better next time.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... Did you see the way Air Shakur just
glared at Opera O and the others? Scary stuff.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
It's amazing she held her own against that lineup,
though, don't you think? There's something
different about her than when she ran the Japan
Cup.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: And, like, Opera O is just so on top of her game lately. Things are starting to feel kind of stagnant, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
But if Shakur can inject new life into everyone
and set the stakes high again, well... I'd sure like
to be there to see how things turn out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smatterings of excited chatter drift over to us,
but Air Shakur gives them no attention.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Normally, people wouldn't put me on a level
anywhere near the big stars. They're only
including me in the gossip 'cause we all entered
this particular spring Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If I wanna do a complete overhaul on my image,
I'm gonna have to grind 'em under my heel.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: And that's exactly what I'll do next time.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Doto and Opera O are both goin' to the
Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Takarazuka Kinen is also known as the spring
Grand Prix. It attracts quite a number of
spectators and would be a good race for
reinventing one's image.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Under normal circumstances, this is about the
time people would start sayin' I don't stand a
chance against them.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But not this time. Let's give 'em somethin' to
cheer about.
